name: Aaron Phillips
bio: Aaron Phillips is a third-generation Floridian from the Orlando area who works as an outdoor guide, writer and stay-at-home dad. He appeared on {{ep:All Falls Down}}, surviving 21 days in the Belize jungle and discovering a bot fly larva in his leg along the way. After the show he collaborated with knifemaker Evan Martin on the Wekiva Knife, named for the Florida river he grew up on.

name: Adam Kavanagh
bio: Adam Kavanagh is an Australian bushman and survival guide from Blackwater, Queensland, who left a long career in coal mining after a health crisis and turned to bushcraft and the paleo lifestyle. He appeared on {{ep:Monkey Business}} in the Namibian desert with partner Samantha Cline and returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}. He now runs survival retreats and outback adventures across Australia.

name: Adam Young
bio: Adam Young is an outdoorsman and wild game guide from Melbourne, Florida, born in 1985. He appeared on {{ep:Jungle Love}} in the rainforests of Nicaragua, where he and partner Jaclyn McCaffrey battled snakes, pumas and extreme dehydration during the 21-day challenge. Off-camera he runs the panfishing community Panfish Nation.

name: Afften DeShazer
bio: Afften DeShazer is a fitness model, actress and real estate agent based in the Chicago area who grew up on a 40-acre horse farm in Indiana. She appeared on {{ep:Edge of Madness}} with partner Zack Buck in Guyana, tapping out a week before the final 14-mile extraction hike.

name: AK Kaye
bio: Amanda "AK" Kaye is an Alabama-based survival instructor, knife designer and motivational speaker who grew up hunting and studying Native American primitive skills. Dubbed the "Southern Sweetheart," she appeared on {{ep:Man vs. Amazon}} and later returned for additional Naked and Afraid challenges.

name: Alana Barfield
bio: Alana Barfield is a Texas survivalist from Goliad County who put her rural upbringing to use on the show. She appeared on {{ep:Paradise Lost}} in Fiji and went on to compete on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} and Naked After Dark, becoming one of the first survivalists to finish a 21-day challenge alone after her partner was medically tapped.

name: Alex Manard
bio: Alex Manard grew up in Champaign, Illinois and moved to Colorado to pursue his love of the outdoors. A survivalist with dwarfism, he appeared on {{ep:Little Person, Big Challenge}} in the Ecuadorian Amazon to prove what his small stature could handle, and later returned for the {{series:Naked and Afraid of Sharks}} 2 special near the Bermuda Triangle.

name: Alexa Towersey
bio: Alexa Towersey is an Australian celebrity strength coach, trainer and motivational speaker. She survived 21 days in the Colombian jungle on Naked and Afraid, then endured 35 days in the South African desert on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Apocalypse}} and represented Australia on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Global Showdown}}.

name: Alexandra Martin
bio: Alexandra Martin is a Vermont-born wellness facilitator based in Stowe who runs the Barefoot & Breathing platform, blending breathwork, herbalism, yoga and primitive skills. She appeared on {{ep:Two Tarzans, One Jane}}, taking on a 21-day challenge in the Colombian rainforest.

name: Ali Moxley
bio: Ali Moxley is a survivalist from Montana who appeared on {{ep:Buffalo Bait}}, a 14-day special set in the Cape buffalo country of South Africa. She and partner Andrew "Reptar" Forestell tapped out on day nine after relentless cold rain extinguished their fire.

name: Alison Teal
bio: Alison Teal is an adventurer, filmmaker and surfer born in the Colorado Rockies and raised between Hawaii and global expeditions with her photographer and yoga-teacher parents. Time Magazine dubbed her the "Female Indiana Jones," and she starred in the breakout first season of Naked and Afraid on {{ep:Island from Hell}}, marooned on a remote Maldivian island where she famously discovered "Trash Island."

name: Allison Frueh
bio: Allison "Ally" Frueh, also known as Allison Wanderland, is a fitness coach and tree-service worker from Austin, Texas, who founded the outdoor community Adult Recess and famously climbed a tree every day for 1,000 days. She made her Naked and Afraid debut in Season 18, which premiered in March 2025.

name: Alyssa Ballestero
bio: Alyssa Ballestero is a social worker from New Hampshire who specializes in at-risk youth and teaches them survival skills. She first appeared on {{ep:Mayan Sacrifice}} in Mexico's Yucatan and went on to become a regular on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, including the 40-day South Africa challenge.

name: Amal Alyassiri
bio: Amal Alyassiri is a Cedar Rapids, Iowa mother who became the first Muslim woman to compete on Naked and Afraid, having grown up surviving as a war refugee in Iraq. She appeared on {{ep:Category 5 Survival}} with partner Duke Brady, filming in Florida as Hurricane Irma hit the Gulf Coast.

name: Amanda Leigh
bio: Amanda Leigh is a Texas-born outdoor adventurer who later moved to California, where she trained in canyoneering, climbing and other extreme outdoor pursuits while working as a pet care specialist. She appeared on {{ep:Nicaragua Nightmare}}, surviving 16 of the 21 days alone after her partner Joshua Bell tapped out due to dehydration.

name: Amanda MacArthur
bio: Amanda MacArthur is a wilderness guide, wildland firefighter and wilderness EMT with a degree in Outdoor Leadership. She appeared on {{ep:Okay, Boomer}}, a generational-clash challenge filmed in the Sonoran Desert.

name: Amanda Wilson
bio: Amanda "Mandy" Wilson (Bublitz) is a personal trainer, former U.S. Marine and mother of two who debuted on Naked and Afraid in Season 18. She and Army veteran Ernie Hinojos tackled a 14-day challenge in Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula, then returned as fan favorites for a 21-day attempt in Botswana.

name: Amber Hargrove
bio: Amber Hargrove is a U.S. Army veteran from Oroville, California who served two combat tours in Iraq as a Sergeant before becoming one of Naked and Afraid's most prolific survivalists. She has appeared across six seasons of the franchise in environments from the Florida Everglades to Namibia, including a roughly 60-day stretch in the Peruvian Amazon for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Amber Shine
bio: Amber Shine is one half of New Zealand's Wild Twins, identical sisters from Waiuku who served together in the Royal NZ Artillery before turning to extreme adventure. She and twin sister Serena appeared on {{ep:Twinning}} in the South African savannah and returned for further franchise specials. They co-authored the book The Wild Twins: Tales of Strength and Survival.

name: Amy Zindler
bio: Amy Zindler is a Naked and Afraid survivalist who appeared on {{ep:Not Today, Satan}}, attempting 21 days with partner Tray Heinke in the punishing landscape of Baja Mexico's Devil's Canyon. She brought duct tape as her survival item, using it to wrap her feet against the searing heat.

name: Anastasia Ashley
bio: Anastasia Ashley is an American professional surfer and model born in San Clemente, California, who won the 2010 Pipeline Women's Pro in Hawaii and appeared in the 2014 Sports Illustrated Swimsuit issue. In 2017 she joined YouTuber Cory Williams in a remote area of Belize for the celebrity special {{ep:Belize Breakdown}}, fashioning a bikini out of duct tape to fend off the jungle's bug bites.

name: Andi Wyldlander
bio: Andi Wyldlander is a veteran, EMT-firefighter and sailing captain who owns Wyldlander Expeditions and Bushcraft, where he guides adventure trips. He appeared on {{ep:A Shart at Redemption}} in 2023 as a Naked and Afraid survivalist.

name: Andrea Lopez
bio: Andrea Lopez is a personal trainer and former police officer from Moab, Utah, and was the first openly gay woman to be featured as a survivalist on Naked and Afraid. She and partner Joe Brandl took on the Namibian wilderness in {{ep:The Darkest Hour}}, completing the full 21 days while she worked through PTSD from her law-enforcement years.

name: Andrew Bishop
bio: Andrew Bishop is an anthropologist who appeared on {{ep:The Labyrinth}} in 2022, taking shelter with a mountaineering partner inside a labyrinth of caves in Colombia while battling bats, swarming bees and storms.

name: Andrew Forestell
bio: Andrew "Reptar" Forestell is a long-distance backpacker and Pacific Crest Trail thru-hiker who has built a following in the hiking community. He appeared on {{ep:Buffalo Bait}}, a 14-day South Africa challenge alongside partner Ali Moxley, where the pair tapped out on day nine after torrential rain and unrelenting cold.

name: Andrew Shayde
bio: Andrew Shayde is a Lexington, Kentucky native who serves as Development Director for the non-profit Arbor Youth Services and is also a comic book author and LGBTQ+ outdoor advocate. He debuted on {{ep:Bite Me}} in South Africa's Vygeboom region and has returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid: Castaways}} and other franchise installments.

name: Angel Rodriguez
bio: Angel Rodriguez is a survival instructor from Santa Cruz, California, originally from Puerto Rico, who teaches wilderness survival classes in Yosemite. He appeared on {{ep:Bad Blood}} in the arid lakebeds of Nicaragua and went on to compete on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in South Africa.

name: Angela Hammer
bio: Angela Hammer is a U.S. Army Combat Military Police veteran, mother and grandmother who runs Tranquilidad Ecuador. She and Chad Keel returned for a redemption episode in South Africa on {{ep:Fire and Fury}}, and she went on to compete on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Angela Narduzzi
bio: Angela Narduzzi is a vegetarian Pittsburgh-area mother who appeared on {{ep:Lord of the Rats}}, pairing with loner survivalist Darren on a rat-infested island off the coast of Thailand. She later returned for additional Naked and Afraid: Bares All specials.

name: Ann Alford
bio: Ann Alford is a Mississippi mother who appeared on {{ep:Haunted and Hungry}}, attempting 21 days with a former Marine sniper in a Colombian swamp said to be haunted. The episode aired as part of Season 14 in 2022.

name: Anna Fanning
bio: Anna Fanning is an Idaho-based survivalist who appeared on Naked and Afraid alongside her husband Jered Fanning. The married couple took on the perilous Philippine jungle in {{ep:Honeymoon from Hell}}, going from watching the show on their couch to attempting the 21-day challenge together.

name: Annie Foley
bio: Annie Foley is a North Ogden, Utah native who at the time of filming was a farmer's wife, mother of four, and photographer based in Essex, Illinois. She appeared with partner Trent Nielsen in {{ep:Fear the Unknown}}, braving the jungles of Belize, where she tapped out a few days into the 21-day challenge.

name: Anthony Coppage
bio: Anthony Coppage is a Haywood County, North Carolina survivalist and the owner of American Ballroom Company dance studio in downtown Canton. He comes from a search-and-rescue and executive protection background, having worked as a search-and-rescue tracker in Nevada. He first appeared on Naked and Afraid in Brazil and returned for a redemption challenge in Limpopo, South Africa.

name: Aosha Wells
bio: Aosha Wells is a California-based outdoor educator, adventure guide, and musician who co-founded Novo Expeditions, a guided backpacking and primitive survival company. He appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2021's {{ep:The Death Ledge}}, in which three survivalists scaled a massive cliff to forage for food.

name: Ashley Burns
bio: Ashley Burns is a car saleswoman and bartender from Coventry, Rhode Island, who grew up fishing, hunting, camping, and gardening. She appeared on Naked and Afraid in {{ep:Botswana Breakdown}}, testing her survival skills in the barren plains of Botswana, before being medically evacuated on day 3 after suffering dizziness.

name: Ashley Kathryn Kattler
bio: Ashley Kathryn Kattler is a Canadian survivalist from Indian Head, Saskatchewan with a background in agriculture and livestock. She appeared on Naked and Afraid starting in 2024 and later returned with partner Andi for a redemption challenge in Tobago.

name: Ashley Morin
bio: Ashley Morin is a Portland-area mother of three (based in Tigard, Oregon) who is a two-time Naked and Afraid survivalist. She debuted with partner Matthew Garland in the Chiricahua Wilderness of Arizona on {{ep:Shart Attack}}, and returned for a 21-day redemption challenge in Tobago on {{ep:A Shart at Redemption}}.

name: Ava Holmes
bio: Ava J. Holmes is a Seattle-based speech-confidence coach, motivational speaker, and TEDxSeattle 2017 speaker who founded the nonprofit Fashion for Conservation. She appeared as a Discovery Channel survivalist on Naked and Afraid in 2018, with episodes including {{ep:Unsurvivable}} and {{ep:Thieves in the Night}}, where she and partner Steven Townes resorted to hunting bats for protein.

name: Ben Johnson
bio: Ben Johnson is a former U.S. Navy SEAL turned survivalist who appeared on Naked and Afraid's 2017 episode {{ep:Lost at Sea}}, in which he and divemaster Sarah Danser were stranded at sea and faced sharks and heatstroke on their way to land in the West Indies.

name: Beverly Reynolds
bio: Beverly Reynolds is a Texas outdoorswoman and angler from the Sam Rayburn area, known on social media as Beverly Reynolds Outdoors. She appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2021 in episodes including {{ep:A Tangled Web in Texas}} and {{ep:USA vs. World}}.

name: Bianca Isidro
bio: Bianca Isidro is a Naked and Afraid survivalist who appeared in the 2018 Superfan challenge {{ep:Island of Tears}}, where she and partner Max faced aggressive caiman, boa constrictors, large spiders, and thorny mangroves on a tropical island in Panama.

name: Billy Berger
bio: Billy Berger is a primitive bowhunter, outdoor author, and Stone Age survivalist from Georgia. He was a Season 1 cast member of Naked and Afraid, surviving 21 days in the swamps of Louisiana with partner Ky Furneaux in {{ep:Beware the Bayou}}, risking attack from deadly snakes, leeches, and alligators.

name: Billy Jennings
bio: Billy Jennings is a survivalist and extreme adventurer from Cedar Hill, Texas, and a former U.S. Army officer who deployed to Afghanistan in 2011-2012. He appeared on Season 17 of Naked and Afraid, navigating Limpopo, South Africa with partner Sam in {{ep:This is Harder Than it Looks}}.

name: Blair Braverman
bio: Blair Braverman is an American adventurer, dogsled racer, and writer who completed the 2019 Iditarod, the 1,000-mile sled-dog race from Anchorage to Nome. In 2019 she appeared on a special episode of Naked and Afraid filmed in a remote area of South Africa, where she survived alongside elephants and hyenas just weeks before beginning Iditarod training.

name: Bo Stuart
bio: Bo Stuart is an outdoorsman, U.S. Army Special Forces (Green Beret) soldier, husband, and father who appeared on Naked and Afraid as a survivalist in 2015. In the episode {{ep:Surthrive}}, he and nurse Debbie braved the jungles of Guyana, contending with caiman and other dangerous wildlife.

name: Brandon Dix
bio: Brandon Dix is a U.S. Navy veteran from Jonesboro, Arkansas who later worked as an animal control officer. He appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2015 in {{ep:Garden of Evil}}, where he and partner Robin Barber survived 14 days on Mexico's Cayo Venado before tapping out together, the first pair in show history to do so.

name: Brandon Pope
bio: Brandon Pope is a Nashville, Arkansas survivalist who appeared on Season 11 of Naked and Afraid in the episode {{ep:Ring of Fire}}, filmed in the Bulgarian mountains. He had previously appeared on Discovery's short-lived 2017 series Darkness.

name: Brandon Snyder
note: Could not confidently identify NAF survivalist Brandon Snyder; results pull up unrelated people

name: Bree Walker
bio: Bree Walker is a Denver-area survivalist and wilderness adventurer who was 30 and working as a real estate agent at the time of her appearance. She appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2016 with partner Clarence in {{ep:Strength in Pain}}, filmed along the Cornejal River in Honduras, lasting 14 of the 21 days before tapping out.

name: Brian Schultz
bio: Brian Schultz appeared on Naked and Afraid as a survivalist in 2018. In {{ep:Swamp Queen}}, he and partner Gabrielle endured deadly snakes, mosquitos, nocturnal predators, and a week-long thunderstorm in the Mississippi swamps; he also appeared in {{ep:Unsurvivable}}.

name: Brittany Laidlaw
bio: Brittany Jane Laidlaw is an Australian somatic ecologist, dancer, and eco-philosopher pursuing a PhD in eco-somatics, and a recipient of the Westpac Future Leaders Award and Prime Minister's Endeavour Award. She appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2024's {{ep:There Will Be Blood}}, surviving 21 days in the South African bushveld.

name: Brittany Wallace
bio: Brittany Wallace is an Idaho-based mother and survivalist who appeared on Season 13 of Naked and Afraid in the 2021 episode {{ep:The Death Ledge}}, in which three survivalists risked scaling a massive cliff to forage for food.

name: Brooke Wright
bio: Brooke Benham Wright is a Discovery Channel survivalist, avid bowhunter, and Adventuress magazine's 2018 Adventuress of the Year. She and husband Matt Wright became the first married couple to compete on Naked and Afraid, with Brooke testing her own skills on Season 10 after watching Matt complete four prior challenges.

name: Bulent Gurcan
bio: Bulent Gurcan is an American survivalist of Turkish descent who spent most of his adult life as a U.S. Border Patrol officer in El Paso County, Texas, and now lives in Point Roberts, Washington. He has appeared multiple times on the franchise, including Season 10 with Cat Orza, {{ep:Blood, Sweat and Fears}} with Sarah Burkett, plus {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Castaways}}, and returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}.

name: Caesar Aliva
bio: Caesar Aliva is a Naked and Afraid survivalist who appeared in the 2018 episode {{ep:A Screw Loose}}, where he and partner Leah Chandler were tormented by swarms of biting chaquistes in the Mayan jungle of Mexico. After Leah was medically evacuated due to a painful injury, Caesar continued alone through torrential rain and unrelenting insects.

name: Calvin Popp
bio: Calvin Popp is a Lubbock, Texas survivalist who appeared on Naked and Afraid in the 2021 episode {{ep:Okay, Boomer}}. At age 22, he was paired with Amanda MacArthur against two older survivalists in the Sonoran Desert of Arizona, with the teams joining forces on day 11 to complete the 21-day challenge.

name: Candice Mishler
bio: Candice Mishler is a Peoria, Arizona survivalist who grew up hunting, fishing, and camping with her father. She debuted on Naked and Afraid in Zambia's Luangwa Valley in {{ep:Beauty and the Beasties}}, tapping out after four days, and later returned for a redemption attempt on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Castaways}}, where a severe bacterial infection forced her medical evacuation.

name: Carrie Booze
bio: Carrie Booze is a former U.S. Marine Corps sergeant and marketing director from Denver, Colorado, who has also worked as a part-time model. She appeared on Naked and Afraid in {{ep:Hearts of Darkness}}, surviving 21 days in Cambodia with fellow military veteran Tom, and returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in 2016.

name: Cass Caddidy
note: Name spelling 'Caddidy' may be a typo for Cass Cassidy. Skipped: subagent only found this entry on fan-wiki (disallowed source). Manual cleanup recommended.

name: Cassidy Flynn
bio: Cassidy Flynn is a San Francisco, California native who grew up riding horses and later took up surfing. She appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2015's {{ep:All or Nothing}}, spending 13 days on West Nalaut Island in the Philippines with partner Jeremy McCaa before the pair tapped out when their water source dried up.

name: Cassie DePecol
bio: Cassie De Pecol is an American explorer, entrepreneur, and speaker best known as the first woman on record to travel to every sovereign country in the world, a feat that earned her two Guinness World Records. Before that journey she appeared on Discovery's {{ep:Double Jeopardy}}, a {{series:Naked and Afraid}} special filmed in the Panamanian rainforest. She now hosts the Against the Odds podcast and runs several wellness and travel ventures.

name: Cassie Turner
bio: Cassie Turner is a marine biologist who was working in deep-sea research at the University of Hawaii when she appeared on Discovery's {{ep:Frozen in Fear}}, surviving 21 days in the Canadian wilderness with partner Greg Wells. A graduate of Siloam Springs High School in Arkansas, she grew up hunting, fishing, and exploring forested land around her childhood home, where she learned many of her primitive survival skills from her grandfather.

name: Cat Orza
bio: Cat Orza is a CrossFit athlete and mountaineer who appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, including a 21-day Colombian rainforest challenge alongside partner Bulent Gurcan. She has been featured in multiple episodes of the series between 2019 and 2020.

name: Chad Bretschneider
bio: Chad Bretschneider is an outdoor enthusiast from Capreol in the Greater Sudbury region of Ontario, Canada. He appeared as a survivalist on {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, including {{ep:There Will Be Blood}} and {{ep:Toxic Redemption}}, during seasons 17 and 18 of the Discovery series.

name: Chad Keel
bio: Chad Keel is an international primitive survival instructor who also works as a Jiu-Jitsu instructor, computer programmer, and musician. He appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, including the 2017 episode {{ep:Ashes to Ashes}}, set on the volcano-ravaged island of Montserrat.

name: Chalese Meyer
bio: Chalese Meyer is a wilderness survival enthusiast from Salt Lake City, Utah, who worked as a recreational therapist and nanny when she joined Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}}. She appeared in episodes including {{ep:King of the Forest}} and {{ep:Into the Wild}}, and has spoken publicly about using her experience on the show to come out as a member of the LGBTQ community.

name: Chance Davis
bio: Chance Davis is a U.S. military veteran turned survivalist who appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}. He is featured in the 2017 episode {{ep:Worlds Collide}}, in which he and partner Melissa Miller survived in Ecuador and unexpectedly crossed paths with the simultaneously-filming XL cast.

name: Charlie Frattini
bio: Charlie Frattini is a U.S. Marine Corps veteran and veteran New York City builder from the Canarsie section of Brooklyn who has completed some of the city's largest construction projects. Trained in jungle survival during his military service, he appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, including episodes {{ep:No Hand-Outs}} and {{ep:Valley of the Banished}}, taking on a 40-day challenge in Ecuador. He has also worked in television on A&E's Sell This House: Extreme.

name: Cheeney Plante
note: Likely a misspelling of Cheeny Plante; bio applied under the correctly-spelled entry

name: Cheeny Plante
bio: Cheeny (Charlene) Plante is a U.S. Air Force veteran from Sanford, Maine, who served eight years as a Survival, Evasion, Resistance and Escape (SERE) specialist training pilots and aircrew. She appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and returned to compete on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Solo}}. She now works as a wilderness guide and is training to become a certified Maine Guide.

name: Chev Dixon
bio: Chev Dixon is a Yonkers, New York-based outdoorsman who works as a native-plant field specialist for Westchester County and runs the Hudson River Riders, a nonprofit that gives local kids access to the river and the Adirondacks. He appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in episodes including {{ep:City Slickers in the Wild}} and {{ep:Toxic Redemption}}, taking on challenges in South Africa and beyond.

name: Chris Fischer
bio: Chris Fischer is a third-generation commercial fisherman from Cape May Court House, New Jersey, and a U.S. Marine Corps veteran. He appeared on multiple seasons of {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, including a Dominica challenge with partner Corinne Kohlen in which he became the first man to finish the 21 days solo after his partner tapped out, and he later competed on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in Colombia.

name: Christina McQueen
bio: Christina McQueen grew up in East Bernstadt, Kentucky, where she learned to hunt and fish from an early age. She appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, including the 2015 episode {{ep:Rumble in the Jungle}}, and went on to compete on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in episodes such as {{ep:Waterworld}} and {{ep:Hike Into Hell}}.

name: Clarence Gilmer II
bio: Clarence Gilmer II is a survival and ecology instructor based in upstate New York who grew up in Baltimore and previously studied and taught computer science and business management before leaving office life in 2006. He has appeared in multiple episodes of {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, including {{ep:Into the Wild}}, {{ep:Strength in Pain}}, {{ep:Man on Fire}}, and {{ep:Out of Africa}}.

name: Clint Jivoin
bio: Clint Jivoin is a professional survival skills instructor based in Indiana, originally from Aurora, Indiana, who has also pursued a country music career. He appeared on the first season of Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the episode {{ep:Punishment in Panama}}, taking on a Panamanian desert island with survivalist Laura Zerra.

name: Cole Wilks
bio: Cole Wilks, known as "Flatlander," is a hunter and bow-hunting coach from Bertram, Texas, who founded Learn, Hunt, Harvest and previously made the final 22 in Season 7 of History's Alone. He appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the season 17 premiere {{ep:Death by Crocodile}}, completing a 21-day challenge in South Africa with partner Michelle Armogida.

name: Connie Kohlen
bio: Corinne "Connie" Kohlen is a registered dietitian based in San Luis Obispo, California, whose survival training includes the National Outdoor Leadership School and the Wilderness Medical Institute. She appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2014 episode {{ep:Playing with Fire}}, paired with Chris Fischer in Dominica, where she tapped out on day 13.

name: Cory Williams
bio: Cory Williams, also known online as Mr. Safety, is a longtime American YouTube personality who founded the SMP Films channel in 1999 and is based in Oklahoma. A former California Department of Forestry firefighter, certified EMT, and stuntman, he appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2017 episode {{ep:Belize Breakdown}} alongside professional surfer Anastasia Ashley.

name: Dallas Langston
bio: Dallas Langston is a U.S. military veteran originally from St. George, Utah, who runs Utah Clean Power and works in solar sales. He appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2023 episode {{ep:Sucker Punched in South Africa}}, surviving alongside fellow castmates in Limpokwena, South Africa.

name: Dan Gardner
bio: Dan Gardner is a self-described professional survivalist who appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2017 episode {{ep:The Monster}}, taking on the harsh Australian outback with saltwater crocodiles and scarce food sources.

name: Dan Link
bio: Dan Link is a conservation biologist based in Honolulu, Hawaii, where he helps manage the Papahanaumokuakea Marine National Monument in the Northwestern Hawaiian Islands. He is a six-time {{series:Naked and Afraid}} cast member and an LGBTQ+ advocate who won the $100,000 grand prize on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}, after first finishing second in the inaugural season of that spin-off.

name: Danelle Tomarchio
bio: Dannelle Tomarchio is a survival skills instructor and coach who appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2020 episode {{ep:Biting Back at Africa}}, a four-person challenge in South Africa. Since the show she has taught survival workshops and led outdoor experiences focused on reconnecting people with their primal instincts.

name: Dani Beau
bio: Danielle "Dani Beau" Beauchemin is a conservationist and emergency management specialist from Mount Laurel, New Jersey, now based in Maine, with certifications in wilderness exploration and search and rescue. A lifelong vegetarian, she became the youngest cast member of {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} and has also appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}, with challenges in locations including the Colombian jungle and Ecuadorian rainforest. She earned a master's degree in environmental science in Iceland.

name: Dani Julien
bio: Dani Julien is a Santa Cruz, California-based outdoorswoman who turned to wilderness therapy after surviving a violent robbery in Tanzania in 2008 in which her roommate was killed. She appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2014 Bahamas episode {{ep:Blood in the Water}} and went on to compete in multiple seasons of {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Daniel Rosenberg
bio: Daniel Rosenberg is an embodied transformation coach, trauma therapist, and former wilderness therapy guide who runs Wild Soul Counseling from Port Townsend, Washington. He spent 21 days in the Colombian jungle as a cast member of Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and has also completed a self-directed 40-day solo walkabout in the Utah wilderness.

name: Danny Graves
bio: Danny Graves is a wilderness skills educator, herbalist, homesteader, and blacksmith based in western Oregon. A two-time cast member of {{series:Naked and Afraid}}, he appeared in episodes including {{ep:Mile-High Clubbed}} and {{ep:Bro, Hold My Fear}}, the latter set in the arid regions of South Africa.

name: Daren Jackson
bio: Daren Jackson is a U.S. Navy veteran who served as a nuclear-trained sailor on a submarine, and a long-distance thru-hiker who has completed the Appalachian Trail and the Pacific Crest Trail. He appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the season 11 episode {{ep:Loaded for Bear}} and has used his platform to encourage greater diversity in the outdoors.

name: Darrin Reay
bio: Darrin Reay is a rock-climbing guide and Wyoming National Guard veteran originally from Sheridan, Wyoming, who has also lived in Moab, Utah and Grand Junction, Colorado. He competed on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} (including a Thailand challenge), on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in South Africa, and won the third season of {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}} and its $100,000 prize.

name: Darvil McBride
bio: Darvil McBride grew up in Hesperia, California in a falconry family and earned the Eagle Scout award before serving as a volunteer LDS missionary in the Brazilian Amazon for two years. He appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2021 episode {{ep:Two is a Crowd}}, set in Lapalala, South Africa. He is a world-champion spearfisherman and serves as Director of Watersports for the Hay Harbor Club on Fishers Island, New York.

name: Dave Tucker
bio: Dave Tucker is an outdoorsman who appeared on Discovery's {{series:Naked and Afraid}} in the 2020 episode {{ep:Snow Daze}}, set in the snowstorm-battered American Rockies of Montana. He was forced to end his challenge early after eating wild mushrooms led to symptoms of potential liver and kidney failure.

name: David Scott
note: identity ambiguous; the IG handle on file matches a different NAF survivalist (Scott Davis)

name: David Shirley
bio: David Shirley is a survivalist from the Fort Smith, Arkansas area who appeared on Discovery Channel's Naked and Afraid in 2019. He was part of a three-person challenge in the dense Ecuadorian jungle alongside Sarah Bartell and Makani Nalu on {{ep:Threesome}}, though he tapped out after just four days.

name: Dawn Dussault
bio: Dawn Dussault is a Canadian survivalist from Kanata, Ontario who has appeared multiple times in the Naked and Afraid franchise. She made her debut on {{ep:Ashes to Ashes}}, dropped on the volcano-ravaged island of Montserrat in 2017, and later returned for the sixth season of {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in 2020.

name: Debbie Harris
bio: Debbie (Buege) Harris is a Waukon, Iowa native and registered nurse who appeared on Discovery Channel's Naked and Afraid in 2015. Paired with former Green Beret Bo Stuart, she completed the 21-day challenge in the remote wetlands of Guyana on {{ep:Surthrive}}, despite contracting a serious infection during filming.

name: Diggie Roberts
bio: Derrick "Diggie" Roberts is an alligator wrestler and outdoorsman from Cameron, Louisiana who was recruited for Naked and Afraid after producers saw his Instagram clips wrestling alligators underwater. He appeared on {{ep:Biting Back at Africa}} in 2020, surviving 21 days in the South African bush, and uses signed memorabilia from the show to raise funds for the National Alliance on Mental Illness.

name: Don Nguyen
bio: Don Nguyen is a climbing guide and ecologist from Oklahoma City, born to Vietnamese refugee parents, who later relocated to Washington State to lead trips on Mount Rainier. He appeared on Naked and Afraid in the Namibian savannah on {{ep:23 Days}}, outlasting two partners to finish the challenge solo. He co-founded Climbers of Color, a nonprofit promoting diversity in mountaineering.

name: Duck Campbell
bio: Dustin "Duck" Campbell is a West Monroe, Louisiana native and outdoorsman best known for his role on {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, where he appeared in roughly 21 episodes across the 2018-2019 seasons. He also competed in the original {{series:Naked and Afraid}} series in 2017 and previously appeared in the bayou-themed series Buying the Bayou.

name: Duke Brady
bio: Duke George Brady is an American-Canadian biologist, wilderness guide, artist, and actor based between California and Alaska. He holds degrees in film/visual arts and environmental science, and worked as a researcher for the U.S. Department of the Interior and as an Alaskan backcountry guide before appearing on Naked and Afraid's season 9 premiere {{ep:Category 5 Survival}} in the Florida swamp during Hurricane Irma. He also completed the 40-day Philippines challenge of {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}.

name: Dustin Hobbs
bio: Dustin Hobbs is a U.S. Army veteran from Grand Island, Nebraska who served nearly nine years in the military, including three deployments to Iraq as a small arms repairman. He appeared on Naked and Afraid in {{ep:The Swarm}} in 2015, surviving 21 days in the jungles of Panama with partner Tara Skubella.

name: Dylan Williams
note: IMDb survivalist credited under that name is Dylan McWilliams (not Williams); cannot verify identity

name: EJ Snyder
bio: Errol James "EJ" Snyder Jr. is a retired U.S. Army sergeant major and Gulf War and Iraq War veteran who earned two Bronze Stars and the Legion of Merit. Nicknamed "Skullcrusher" from his days as a drill sergeant, he debuted on Naked and Afraid in 2013 in the Serengeti and went on to compete in the first season of {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} and to co-host season 9 of Dual Survival. He now lives in Fayetteville, North Carolina, and works as a motivational speaker and survival instructor.

name: Eleanor Pollock
bio: Eleanor Pollock is a survivalist who appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2025. Cast as a cautious newlywed paired with a wounded adventurer, she attempted 21 days in the remote Philippine wilderness on {{ep:Seventeen Stitches}}, contending with fire ants, infections, and extreme hunger.

name: Elijah Strongheart
bio: Elijah Strongheart is a wilderness guide who appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2022. He was paired with software engineer Monica Heim in the Botswana desert on {{ep:Night Stalkers}}, where the duo navigated aggressive elephant herds and communication challenges over their 21-day attempt.

name: Elise Featherstone
bio: Elise Featherstone is a Calgary-based aviation uniform program manager and former Miss Universe Canada delegate who has worked in the airline industry for more than 16 years. She competed on Naked and Afraid in 2024 on {{ep:Colombian Cave Women}}, taking on a 21-day challenge in the Colombian jungle.

name: Elizabeth Hensley
bio: Elizabeth Hensley is a Kentucky-based survivalist who appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2021. She was partnered with Andrew Shayde in the Vygeboom region of South Africa for {{ep:Bite Me}}, with the challenge cut short for her partner after he developed a suspected MRSA infection.

name: Elsa Marie Keefe
bio: Elsa Marie Keefe is an artist and photographer originally from Boston who is based in New Paltz, New York, and an Elon University graduate whose fine-art practice centers on the nude human form in nature. She appeared on Naked and Afraid season 16 in 2023, partnered with Chev Dixon for a 14-day challenge in South Africa on {{ep:City Slickers in the Wild}}.

name: Emily Caselman
bio: Emily Caselman is a Cameron, Missouri native and 2008 Cameron High School graduate who appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2021. She was paired with a cautious archaeologist in the Texas desert on {{ep:A Tangled Web in Texas}}, contending with mountain lions, tarantulas, and wild temperature swings.

name: Eric Jorgenson
bio: Eric Jorgenson is a survivalist from Fargo, North Dakota who appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2019. He was paired with "Mama" Kel in Africa for {{ep:Stalked on All Sides}}, where they endured threats from elephants, hippos, and lions along with a debilitating injury.

name: Erin Heim
bio: Erin Heim is a former police officer who appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2024. She was paired with professional boxer Martin Sims for {{ep:Hit by Hippos}}, attempting to survive 21 days in South Africa while threatened by a herd of aggressive hippos.

name: Ernie Hinojos
bio: Ernie Hinojos is a 30-year U.S. Army veteran and former Little Rock and Bryant, Arkansas police officer who became a longtime fan of Naked and Afraid before joining the show himself. He appeared in 2025 paired with Amanda Wilson for a 14-day challenge in Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula on {{ep:Alone and Terrified}}.

name: Eva Rupert
bio: Eva Rupert is a tattoo artist, primitive-skills instructor, and self-described renaissance woman based in Flagstaff, Arizona who grew up in Connecticut. She has worked as a tattooist, educator, sawyer, brewery manager, and mechanic, and co-founded the nonprofit Tiny Bikes: Big Change. She debuted on Naked and Afraid in 2014 with a 21-day challenge in Madagascar.

name: Fairland Ferguson
bio: Fairland Ferguson is an equestrian trick rider from Staunton, Virginia, now based in the Greensboro, North Carolina area, where she serves as equestrian director at Shooting Star Horse Farm. A Coastal Carolina University graduate, she previously performed in Dolly Parton's Stampede and a touring equestrian show, and survived a 70-foot cliff fall that broke 46 bones. She appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2024 in {{ep:Unbreakable}}, completing a 21-day challenge in the Colombian jungle.

name: Fernanda Perez
bio: Fernanda Perez Alarcon is a marine biologist and adventure-sports athlete from Sonora, Mexico, and a graduate of the University of Sonora who belongs to the International Association of Survival and Bushcraft. She first competed in the inaugural season of Discovery's Spanish-language Supervivencia al Desnudo Latinoamerica in Colombia's Vichada plains. She later appeared on the U.S. Naked and Afraid in 2025 on {{ep:Punched by the Prairie State}} and returned for {{series:Naked and Afraid: Global Showdown}} representing Mexico.

name: Fernando Calderon
bio: Fernando Calderon is a Ventura County, California fire captain and seasoned survivalist who has appeared in multiple seasons of the Naked and Afraid franchise. He debuted on the show in 2013 during a 21-day challenge in Malaysia, then went on to compete in {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}}, {{series:Naked and Afraid: Solo}}, and {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}.

name: Forrest Galante
bio: Forrest Galante is an American outdoor adventurer and wildlife biologist who was raised on a farm in Zimbabwe before returning to California, and he holds a biology degree from UC Santa Barbara with an emphasis in marine biology and herpetology. He made his TV debut on Naked and Afraid in 2013 in Panama, posting one of the show's highest-ever primitive survival ratings, and has since hosted Extinct or Alive and Mysterious Creatures with Forrest Galante on Animal Planet. His 2021 memoir Still Alive: A Wild Life of Rediscovery was published by Hachette Books.

name: Frank Eytcheson
bio: Frank "Crazy Frank" Eytcheson is a Jacksonville, Florida-based backcountry hunter and survivalist who joined Naked and Afraid after years of watching the show with his wife. He made his debut on season 16's {{ep:Broke Back Jungle}} in the jungles of Tobago in 2023 and went on to appear in season 17 and on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Apocalypse}}.

name: Gabriel Moraga
bio: Gabriel Moraga is a geologist and self-described nomad who appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2022. He took on a 21-day challenge in Botswana's Okavango Delta on {{ep:Abandoned Village}}, surviving among the ruins of a fishing camp while contending with aggressive hippos and nocturnal predators.

name: Gabrielle Balassone
bio: Gabrielle Balassone is an attorney and mother of three from Carroll County, Maryland who holds degrees from Carroll Community College, the University of Baltimore, and the University of Baltimore School of Law. One of the most accomplished survivalists in the franchise's history, she has completed five challenges across {{series:Naked and Afraid}} and {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} since 2017, including two solo runs.

name: Gary Golding
bio: Gary Golding is a Los Angeles-based actor, environmental advocate, and survival expert who goes by the moniker "Tarzan of Los Angeles." He first appeared on Naked and Afraid in 2018 and competed in season 7 of {{series:Naked and Afraid XL}} in Brazil's Jalapao region, dropping out on day 40. He has also appeared on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing}}.

name: Gary Underhill
bio: Gary Underhill is a tactical and defensive firearms instructor from Reno, Nevada, a retired police officer, and a former military reservist who served in Iraq and Afghanistan. He grew up in Arizona's Sonoran Desert and made his Naked and Afraid debut in the season 5 premiere {{ep:Forsaken}} in 2015, partnered with Kim Kelly in Panama's Isla San Jose.
